title: Emeritus is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Emeritus is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Emeritus, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Emeritus:
Emeritus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emeritus!
